scores.correctness_notes: All core content is correct: fixture with temp_model(), deploy(), wait() with combined all_active+all_agents_idle lambda, error=any_error, successes=3 default. Extra examples (multi-app, custom predicate) are consistent with the framework.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — extra parameters (delay, app, channel, num_units, config, trust, revision) and properties (app.is_active, unit.agent_status.status) are plausible real API elements, not fabrications. Per scoring rules, extra correct detail is not a hallucination.
